# Olas Bond

> Bonding app for liquidity provision in the Olas ecosystem

## Overview

Bond is the Olas liquidity bonding app. Users provide liquidity (LP tokens) and bond them to the protocol in exchange for OLAS tokens at a discount, subject to a vesting period. This builds protocol-owned liquidity for the Olas ecosystem.

## Key Features

- Bonding Products: Browse active bonding products across chains, see current OLAS price, discount, vesting period, and remaining supply. Bond LP tokens for discounted OLAS.
- My Bonds: Track active bonds, view maturity status, and redeem vested OLAS tokens.
- Paths: Step-by-step bonding paths showing the full Pool → Bridge → Bond flow across 9 chains (Ethereum, Gnosis, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Celo, Mode, Solana).
- Solana Liquidity: Wrap/unwrap SOL to WSOL for Orca whirlpool liquidity on Solana.

## Documentation

- Website: https://bond.olas.network/
- Documentation: https://bond.olas.network/docs
- Disclaimer: https://olas.network/disclaimer

## Technology

Built with Next.js, React, and Web3 technologies. Supports multiple blockchain networks including Ethereum, Gnosis, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, and Solana.

## Olas Ecosystem

- Olas (hub): https://olas.network/llms.txt
- Govern (vote on proposals, manage veOLAS, direct staking emissions, make donations, manage epochs): https://govern.olas.network/llms.txt
- Operate (review live staking contracts, run agents): https://operate.olas.network/llms.txt
- Marketplace (browse agents, components, blueprints): https://marketplace.olas.network/llms.txt
